name: Write File
description: Write full content to a file, creating it or overwriting it.

function.name: write_file
function.description: Write content to a file at the specified path. Creates the file if it does not exist, or overwrites it if it does (controlled by the overwrite flag). Parent directories are created automatically by default. Use this tool when you need to create a new file or completely replace a file's content. For surgical line-level edits to an existing file, prefer the patch tool instead.

file_path.description: Absolute or relative path of the file to write.

content.description: Full content to write to the file. Written exactly as provided — no automatic newline is appended.

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite the file if it already exists. Defaults to true. Set to false to prevent accidental overwrites.

create_dirs.description: Whether to automatically create missing parent directories. Defaults to true.
